title: The Rundown's Milestone Year: 2025 Highlights
summary: In 2025, The Rundown reached a major milestone with over 1 million subscribers and expanded its reach to more than 2 million readers through high-profile interviews and the launch of new industry-specific publications.

title: AI Breakthroughs Reshape Tech Landscape in 2025
summary: Key AI milestones in 2025 included China's R1 model causing a $600B market shift for Nvidia and OpenAI’s Stargate Project, which secured over $1.4T in commitments from tech giants. These advancements, alongside Google’s Nano Banana and AI video innovations, significantly transformed the industry.

title: AI Predictions Shift: Automation Delayed, New Models Emerge
summary: The AI Futures Project now forecasts full coding automation by 2031-2032. Meanwhile, Alibaba’s Qwen team has unveiled Qwen-Image-2512, an advanced text-to-image model with enhanced realism.
